text.title: FinOps Framework
text.summary: Three-phase Inform/Optimize/Operate cycle with expected savings per strategy and AI/ML workload cost patterns.

rule.statement: Enable billing exports (AWS CUR, GCP BigQuery, Azure Cost Management) with daily refresh. Target >90% tag coverage for cost attribution.
rule.rationale: You cannot optimize what you cannot see. 100% tag coverage is unrealistic due to untaggable resources; 90%+ is the mature target.

rule.statement: Mandatory tags: Environment, Owner, Project, CostCenter. Enforce via SCP/Policy to block untagged resource creation.
rule.rationale: Four tags enable attribution by env, person, product, and finance. SCPs prevent drift by requiring tags at creation time, not retroactively.

rule.statement: Purchase Savings Plans only after 30+ days of usage data. Commit to 80% of baseline usage to maintain flexibility.
rule.rationale: Committing to more than baseline usage results in unused commitments (negative ROI). 80% baseline leaves 20% buffer for workload changes.

rule.statement: Set budget alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%, and 120% thresholds. Include a forecasted-overage alert at 100%.
rule.rationale: Multi-threshold alerts give teams early warning (50%) and escalation path (100%+). Forecasted alerts enable proactive action before the month ends.

rule.statement: Conduct weekly cost reviews at team level and monthly reviews with optimization action items and savings tracking.
rule.rationale: Weekly cadence keeps cost accountability active; monthly review measures ROI and adjusts targets.

rule.statement: For training jobs: use Spot instances with checkpoint-based restart. Checkpoint every 100-500 steps to S3/GCS.
rule.rationale: Spot instances cost 70-90% less than on-demand. Checkpointing ensures a spot interruption loses at most one checkpoint interval of work.

rule.statement: For inference: implement response caching (20-60% savings) and request batching. Evaluate model quantization (50% cost, 2x speed).
rule.rationale: Inference at scale is dominated by repeated identical requests and underutilized GPU batch capacity.
